notes: Reviewed ensureProfileForAuthenticatedUser. Backend profile creation still goes through authenticated BackendApiClient with Clerk token and X-Ohey-User-ID; no unauthenticated profile creation introduced. Default display name is non-email-derived to avoid PII exposure.
Reviewed Apple OAuth feature flag. Compile-time flag only controls button visibility and does not weaken auth checks.
Reviewed OAuth callback flow. Existing callback scheme/host check remains; post-callback profile creation uses authenticated client. Daily prompt removal has no security impact.
Reviewed auth session handler. It now ensures an authenticated backend profile instead of opening profile form; no token handling changes beyond existing auth state.
Reviewed import-only change for config use in part file.
Reviewed Apple button gating. Hiding unconfigured provider prevents failed auth path exposure; Google path unchanged.
